name: @aipehub/hub-steward
description: AipeHub hub steward (管家) — an LlmAgent that turns a member's plain-language instruction into a STRUCTURED PROPOSAL over their own managed agents + workflows. The steward never executes writes itself: the host re-classifies each action (safe / dangerous / cross_hub / forbidden) and runs it behind the existing member services + a Phase 16 approval inbox, so dangerous + cross-hub actions always get a human's second confirmation.
